title: Black Dragon roll 6 sets opponent skip-turn flag

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 6, your opponent must skip their next turn.

plan.title: Black Dragon roll 6 sets opponent skip-turn flag
plan.summary: Force a successful die roll and verify opponent's next turn is skipped once.

notes: Black Dragon is on player_1 field and can activate during player_1 turn.

steps: End player_1 turn and attempt to start player_2 turn.
Advance to next available turn after skip.

expectedAssertions.label: Turn returns to player 1 or next legal turn

manualVerification: Run a failure roll of 5 separately to confirm no skip flag.
riskNotes: Runtime support is partial; final skip action depends on resolver support.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Test success path first, then failure path as regression expansion.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
